name: LEGO: Jurassic World - Legend of Isla Nublar
original_name: LEGO Jurassic World: Legend of Isla Nublar
overview: Set in 2012, three years before the Jurassic World movie, Owen Grady and Claire Dearing team up on Isla Nublar to deal with everything the Jurassic World park throws their way, including a mysterious saboteur who wants to destroy the park forever!
